llm_response:
# Resignation Letter

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I have decided to resign from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. This decision is effective on [Last Working Date], allowing for a smooth and orderly departure from the team. I want to ensure that my resignation is handled with the utmost professionalism and respect for the organization.

After careful consideration, I have determined that it is the right time for me to pursue new career growth opportunities that align more closely with my long-term professional goals. Additionally, some personal circumstances have arisen that require my full attention and presence elsewhere. While I have greatly valued my time here, I believe that stepping away now will allow me to focus on these new opportunities without compromising my current responsibilities.

I am deeply grateful for the support and mentorship I have received during my tenure and would like to express my sincere "thank you for the opportunity" to have worked alongside such a dedicated team. I will do everything possible to assist in the transition period, ensuring that my departure does not disrupt our operations. My plan for this transition includes:
*   Completing all pending projects and documenting current workflows.
*   Preparing comprehensive handover materials for my successor.
*   Assisting in training the team members who will take over my duties.

Once again, I am "thank you for the opportunity" to be part of this great company, and I wish you and the entire team continued success in the future.
